# UC-17.5.6 · Forcepoint ZTNA Private Application Access Latency (`forcepoint:one`)

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Performance, Operations &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We use network security tools to watch who accesses what, help prevent data leaks, enforce network isolation, and secure cloud and remote access.*

---

## Description

High latency on private apps drives users to bypass ZTNA with split tunnel tricks.

## Value

Network teams optimize connector placement before shadow paths appear.

## Implementation

Install the Insights SIEM app, configure HEC inputs per product line, and align indexes (`proxy`, `email`, `dlp`, `sase`). Normalize usernames to enterprise SAMAccountName.

## SPL

```spl
index=sase sourcetype="forcepoint:one" earliest=-24h
| where match(lower(event_type),"(?i)ztna|private app")
| stats perc95(latency_ms) as p95_ms by app_name, connector_name
| where p95_ms>300
| sort -p95_ms
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats `summariesonly` count
  from datamodel=Email.Email
  by Email.user, Email.action, Email.src, Email.dest span=1h
| sort - count
```

## Visualization

Bar chart (p95 latency), map (connector region).

## Known False Positives

Spikes from new SaaS rollouts, automated workflows, sanctioned bulk uploads, or M&A integration.

- [Splunkbase — Forcepoint Insights SIEM App](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/8053)
